name: commission-system-vercel-proxy-single-owner-single-gate
description: Vercel frontend and GAS backend with proxy-only transport, single owner registry, one release gate, and runtime size gate.

scripts.check:api: node --check api/_gasProxyCommon.js && node --check api/gas.js && node --check api/login.js && node --check api/public-config.js
scripts.build: python3 tools/generate_vercel_env.py && python3 tools/sync_frontend_partials.py --check && python3 tools/release_gate.py
